justification: Embedded bare-CFF plus HelveticaLTStd substitution on dense small text; AA edge redistribution plus Liberation-vs-Nimbus letterforms. Measured worst (2026-07-11, page 1 @72dpi, re-validated after /AP rendering landed — all widgets are unchecked checkboxes whose /Off states carry no appearance, so appearances add no ink): 12.14% over d24, 19.82% over d8, mean 7.79.
